title: ChatGPT Voice arrives on desktop with agent control
friendlyTitle: You can now control ChatGPT desktop agents with your voice
summary: OpenAI says ChatGPT Voice is rolling out globally in its desktop app, powered by GPT-Live. Users can speak while it listens and use voice commands to direct multiple agents running in ChatGPT Work or Codex.
friendlySummary: ChatGPT Voice is coming to the desktop app. You can talk to it and direct several work or coding agents by voice.
whyItMatters: Voice can make agent workflows more accessible while users move between tasks, but spoken instructions are easy to make ambiguous. Confirming consequential actions remains sensible when agents can operate a computer or coordinate work.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This can help when your hands are busy or typing is difficult. Check important actions before the agents carry them out.
